content:
🚀 FireRedVAD | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Accurate detection of voice activity and specific audio events in various languages for applications requiring audio analysis.
✨ Key Features: • State-of-the-art Voice Activity Detection (VAD) • Industrial-grade Audio Event Detection (AED) • Supports 100+ languages • Detects speech, singing, and music • Supports non-streaming and streaming VAD
📖 Summary: FireRedVAD is a state-of-the-art Voice Activity Detection (VAD) and Audio Event Detection (AED) solution. It supports over 100 languages for speech, singing, and music detection, offering both streaming and non-streaming capabilities. The system achieves high accuracy, outperforming existing VAD solutions on benchmark datasets.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
